commands.bash: if command -v apt >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt list --upgradable; elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf check-update; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum check-update; else echo 'Package manager not supported'; fi
commands.cmd: powershell "try { Get-Module -ListAvailable PSWindowsUpdate -ErrorAction Stop; Get-WUList } catch { Write-Host 'PSWindowsUpdate module not installed. Install with: Install-Module PSWindowsUpdate' }"
commands.powershell: try { Get-Module -ListAvailable PSWindowsUpdate -ErrorAction Stop; Get-WUList } catch { Write-Host 'PSWindowsUpdate module not installed. Install with: Install-Module PSWindowsUpdate' }
commands.wsl: if command -v apt >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt list --upgradable; elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf check-update; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum check-update; else echo 'Package manager not supported'; fi
commands.zsh: if command -v apt >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt list --upgradable; elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf check-update; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum check-update; else echo 'Package manager not supported'; fi
